name: minty
description: Private network memory for OpenClaw, Hermes, and MCP agents — local relationship retrieval over contacts and conversations via UI, CLI, and stdio MCP.
author: Sree Sanakkayala

scripts.linkedin:setup: npm install playwright --save-optional && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.demo: npm run seed:demo && MINTY_DEMO=1 node crm/server.js
scripts.test: node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/unit/schema.test.js tests/unit/utils.test.js tests/unit/scoring.test.js tests/unit/contact-index.test.js tests/unit/contact-evidence.test.js scripts.network:changes: node scripts/agent-query.js "people I haven't talked to recently who I used to talk to frequently — show changes in communication patterns"
scripts.network:reconnect: node scripts/agent-query.js "people I should reconnect with — fading relationships worth reviving"
